name: mdopendata
description: Local PostgreSQL and PostGIS access for the mdopendata datastore.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only MCP access to the local mdopendata PostGIS database
interface.longDescription: Use the local mdopendata plugin to inspect and query the mdopendata PostgreSQL and PostGIS datastore through a plugin-local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Run a read-only query against mdopendata.
